hero.title: Sushmita Kc
hero.subtitle: Driving measurable growth through data-driven digital strategies
hero.headline: Driving Growth Through Digital Excellence
hero.description: I help ambitious brands turn audiences into customers with performance marketing, SEO, and conversion-focused strategy.

about.headline: Digital Marketing Expert
about.bio: I'm a results-obsessed Digital Marketing Specialist with 7+ years of experience building growth engines for brands across Brisbane, Australia and Kathmandu, Nepal. My approach blends creative storytelling with rigorous analytics to deliver campaigns that don't just look good — they perform.
about.philosophy: Great marketing is a science and an art. I believe every dollar spent should be measurable, every channel should ladder up to a business goal, and every experiment should teach us something. I lead with data, but I never forget there's a human on the other side of the screen.

portfolio.title: E-Commerce SEO Turnaround
portfolio.challenge: A beautiful store with almost zero organic visibility. Category pages were cannibalizing each other and technical debt was throttling crawl budget.
portfolio.strategy: We rebuilt the site architecture, launched a topical content hub, and fixed 240+ technical issues. A digital PR push earned 38 high-authority backlinks in 4 months.

testimonial.quote: Sushmita turned our website into our #1 sales channel. The ROI speaks for itself.
testimonial.name: Maya Thompson

portfolio.excerpt: How a technical SEO reset and content hub grew organic revenue from $180K to $1.2M in under a year.

portfolio.title: SaaS Google Ads Scale
portfolio.challenge: Rising CPCs and a ROAS that couldn't support aggressive growth targets. The account was broad, unfocused, and bleeding budget.
portfolio.strategy: We restructured into tightly themed campaigns, implemented value-based bidding, and built a server-side offline conversion import from the CRM.

testimonial.quote: Best ROI we've ever seen from paid. Sushmita understands the math behind growth.
testimonial.name: Daniel Reyes

portfolio.excerpt: Value-based bidding and CRM integration took this SaaS account from 2.1x to 5.8x ROAS.

portfolio.title: Fitness Brand Social Launch
portfolio.challenge: A new DTC brand with no audience and a crowded market dominated by legacy players.
portfolio.strategy: A creator-led TikTok + Instagram strategy with weekly Reels, UGC challenges, and micro-influencer seeding.

testimonial.quote: We sold out our first drop because of the community Sushmita built.
testimonial.name: Priya Sharma

portfolio.excerpt: A creator-led launch that took a brand from zero to 112K followers and $680K in 90 days.

testimonial.quote: Our content finally sounds like us — and it brings in real pipeline.

testimonial.quote: Email became our most profitable channel overnight. The flows pay for themselves.

portfolio.excerpt: Nine lifecycle flows that lifted email from 5% to 38% of total revenue.

blog.title: Why ROAS Is Lying to You (And What to Track Instead)
blog.excerpt: Return on ad spend hides more than it reveals. Here's the profit-first metric stack I use with every client.
blog.content:
Most marketers optimize for ROAS because it's easy. But ROAS ignores margin, LTV, and the timing of revenue. In this deep dive I break down value-based bidding, contribution margin, and how to wire your CRM into Google Ads so the algorithm optimizes for profit, not vanity.

The short version: track contribution margin per channel, not blended ROAS. Set up offline conversion imports. And stop celebrating a 5x ROAS on a product that ships at a loss.
blog.author: Sushmita Kc

blog.title: 5 GA4 Attribution Myths Costing You Budget
blog.excerpt: Last-click is dead, but the replacements come with traps. Let's separate signal from noise.
blog.content: GA4's data-driven attribution is powerful, but it's not magic. I cover the five most common misinterpretations — from ignoring cross-device lag to over-trusting modeled conversions — and how to build a dashboard your CFO will actually believe.
blog.author: Sushmita Kc

blog.title: Content Clusters That Actually Rank in 2025
blog.excerpt: Topic clusters aren't new — but most brands build them backwards. Here's the corrected blueprint.
blog.content: Pillar pages fail when they're too broad. I show how to size a pillar, choose supporting spokes, and interlink in a way that compounds authority. Includes a real teardown of a cluster that grew from zero to 41K sessions.
blog.author: Sushmita Kc

blog.title: The 2025 Social Algorithm Playbook
blog.excerpt: What changed, what didn't, and how to build a content system that survives the next update.
blog.content: Algorithms rewarded consistency and watch-time this year. I share the posting cadence, format mix, and creator-leverage strategy that took a client to 112K followers in 90 days.
blog.author: Sushmita Kc

blog.title: Positioning First: Strategy Before Tactics
blog.excerpt: Tactics without strategy are just expensive noise. A framework for finding your one bold promise.
blog.content: Before you touch a single ad, you need a position. I walk through the messaging architecture I used to reposition a fintech and lift trial-to-paid by 61%.
blog.author: Sushmita Kc

contactPage.title: Let's build your growth engine
